# Boudoir Photography Club
# https://boudoirphotographyclub.com
# A directory of professional boudoir photographers across all 50 US states

## About
Boudoir Photography Club is the premier online directory connecting clients with professional boudoir photographers. We feature 667+ verified photographers across 626 cities in all 50 US states plus Washington DC.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/
- Browse All States: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/boudoir-photographers
- Find Near Me: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/boudoir-photographer-near-me
- How It Works: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/how-it-works
- About: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/about
- Contact: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com/contact

## Directory Structure
- State pages: /boudoir-photographer/{state-slug} (51 pages)
- City pages: /boudoir-photographer/{state-slug}/{city-slug} (626 pages)
- Photographer profiles: /photographer/{photographer-slug} (667 pages)

## Content Topics
- Boudoir photography styles: romantic, luxury, bridal, fine art, glamour, dark & moody, editorial
- Boudoir session planning: what to wear, what to expect, pricing guide, posing tips
- Photographer selection: how to choose, questions to ask, portfolio review tips
- Session types: solo boudoir, couples boudoir, bridal boudoir, maternity boudoir

## Contact
- Email: hello@boudoirphotographyclub.com
- Website: https://boudoirphotographyclub.com
